hook.summary: Introduction of the game as a relaxing 'breather' featuring a Sinistea card reveal.
hook.visual_action: A smartphone displays the game interface, transitioning to a close-up of a Sinistea card against a soft purple background.
hook.text_overlay: ポケポケで ホッと 一息つきませんか？
hook.voiceover_transcript: ポケポケで、ホッと一息つきませんか？

scene_flow: Hook showing a Sinistea card and inviting the viewer to take a break.
Showcasing the game being played on smartphones during 'gap time' with calming visuals.
Displaying a collection of aesthetically pleasing Pokémon cards to highlight the 'healing' atmosphere.
Closing with a call to action, game logo, and details on the 30-day login mission rewards.
on_screen_text: 「30日プレゼント」ミッション開催中！
スキマ時間にスマホで、
ポケモンに囲まれる癒しのひと時
毎日のログインで特別な報酬や最大30パック分のパック砂時計を手に入れよう！
今すぐログインで 10パック分ゲット！
毎日2パック無料で開封
audience_proxy: Casual Pokémon fans and mobile gamers looking for a relaxing, low-stress collection experience during short breaks.
